1.gl: to tend a flock; i.e. pasture it; intransitively, to graze (literally or figuratively); generally to rule; by extension, to associate with (as a friend)
1.kj: [idiom] break, companion, keep company with, devour, eat up, evil entreat, feed, use as a friend, make friendship with, herdman, keep (sheep) (-er), pastor, [phrase] shearing house

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

1.gl: to lack; by implication, to fail, want, lessen
1.kj: be abated, bereave, decrease, (cause to) fail, (have) lack, make lower, want.

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: to crouch (on all four legs folded, like a recumbent animal); be implication, to recline, repose, brood, lurk, imbed
2.kj: crouch (down), fall down, make a fold, lay, (cause to, make to) lie (down), make to rest, sit.

2.gl: repose or (adverbially) peacefully; figuratively, consolation (specifically, matrimony); hence (concretely) an abode
2.kj: comfortable, ease, quiet, rest(-ing place), still.

2.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
2.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

2.gl: properly, to run with asparkle, i.e. flow; hence (transitively), to conduct, and (by inference) to protect, sustain

3.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
3.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

3.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
3.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

3.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
3.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

3.gl: properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that
3.kj: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), [phrase] lest, that, to.

3.gl: the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity
3.kj: [idiom] even, ([idiom] that which is altogether) just(-ice), (un-)right(-eous) (cause, -ly, -ness).

3.gl: a track (literally or figuratively); also a rampart (as circular)
3.dv: or feminine מַעְגָּלָה; from the same as H5696 (עָגֹל);

4.gl: bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral)
4.kj: adversity, affliction, bad, calamity, [phrase] displease(-ure), distress, evil((-favouredness), man, thing), [phrase] exceedingly, [idiom] great, grief(-vous), harm, heavy, hurt(-f

4.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
4.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

4.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
4.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

4.gl: properly, to sigh, i.e. breathe strongly; by implication, to be sorry, i.e. (in a favorable sense) to pity, console or (reflexively) rue; or (unfavorably) to avenge (oneself)
a scion, i.e. (literally) a stick (for punishing, writing, fighting, ruling, walking, etc.) or (figuratively) a clan
4.kj: [idiom] correction, dart, rod, sceptre, staff, tribe.
4.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to branch off;

4.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
4.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

5.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
5.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
5.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

5.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
5.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
5.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

5.gl: to set in a row, i.e. arrange, put in order (in a very wide variety of applications)
5.kj: put (set) (the battle, self) in array, compare, direct, equal, esteem, estimate, expert (in war), furnish, handle, join (battle), ordain, (lay, put, reckon up, set) (in) order, pre

5.gl: a front, i.e. part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before
5.kj: about, (over) against, [idiom] aloof, [idiom] far (off), [idiom] from, over, presence, [idiom] other side, sight, [idiom] to view.

5.gl: to be fat; transitively, to fatten (or regard as fat); specifically to anoint; figuratively, to satisfy;  to remove (fat) ashes (of sacrifices)
5.kj: accept, anoint, take away the (receive) ashes (from), make (wax) fat.
5.dv: a primitive root; also denominatively (from H1880 (דֶּשֶׁן))

5.gl: a cup (as a container), often figuratively, a lot (as if a potion); also some unclean bird, probably an owl (perhaps from the cup-like cavity of its eye)
5.dv: from an unused root meaning to hold together;

6.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
6.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
6.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

6.gl: good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun, both in the masculine and the feminine, the singular and the plural (good, a good or good thing, a good man or woman; the good, goods or good things, g
6.kj: beautiful, best, better, bountiful, cheerful, at ease, [idiom] fair (word), (be in) favour, fine, glad, good (deed, -lier, -liest, -ly, -ness, -s), graciously, joyful, kindly, kind

6.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
6.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

6.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
6.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

6.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
6.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

6.gl: a particle of affirmation, surely; hence (by limitation) only
6.kj: also, in any wise, at least, but, certainly, even, howbeit, nevertheless, notwithstanding, only, save, surely, of a surety, truly, verily, [phrase] wherefore, yet (but).
